claim_true: Paris is the capital of France.
claim_false: Berlin is the capital of France.

claim_true: Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.
claim_false: Water freezes at 100 degrees Celsius.

claim_true: The Sun is a star.
claim_false: The Sun is a planet.

claim_true: The Great Pyramids are located in Egypt.
claim_false: The Great Pyramids are located in Mexico.

claim_true: Light travels faster than sound.
claim_false: Sound travels faster than light.

claim_true: The human heart is located in the chest.
claim_false: The human heart is located in the stomach.

claim_true: Shakespeare wrote the play Hamlet.
claim_false: Shakespeare wrote the play Hamlet in modern English in 2020.

claim_true: Objects fall downward because of gravity.
claim_false: Objects fall upward because of gravity.

claim_true: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
claim_false: The Pacific Ocean is the smallest ocean on Earth.

claim_true: The adult human body has 206 bones.
claim_false: The adult human body has 26 bones.

claim_true: All bachelors are unmarried men.
claim_false: All bachelors are married men.

claim_true: A square has four equal sides and four right angles.
claim_false: A square has three equal sides and six right angles.

claim_true: Two plus two equals four.
claim_false: Two plus two equals five.

claim_true: If all birds can fly, and a penguin is a bird, then penguins can fly.
claim_false: If all birds can fly, and a penguin is a bird, then penguins cannot fly.

claim_true: A statement cannot be both entirely true and entirely false at the same time.
claim_false: A statement can be both entirely true and entirely false at the same time.

claim_true: Ten is greater than five.
claim_false: Five is greater than ten.

claim_true: If all cats are mammals, and all mammals are animals, then all cats are animals.
claim_false: If all cats are mammals, and all mammals are animals, then no cats are animals.

claim_true: The next number after 2, 4, 6 in the pattern is 8.
claim_false: The next number after 2, 4, 6 in the pattern is 9.

claim_true: If A is warmer than B, and B is warmer than C, then A is warmer than C.
claim_false: If A is warmer than B, and B is warmer than C, then A is colder than C.

claim_true: Each person has exactly one biological mother.
claim_false: Each person has zero biological mothers.
